title: GATE Behavioural Baseline Artifact (C19)
description: Signed baseline tied to a specific ABOM version. Records per-dimension distributions of agent behaviour observed during a controlled corpus window. Consumed by the C19 Drift Detector. Not an event - a stored, signed artifact.

baseline_hash.description: Stable hash over the canonicalised baseline contents excluding this field and the signature. Recorded in every gate.assurance.drift_decision event.

baseline_id.description: UUID for this baseline. Used as a stable reference across re-baselining events.

abom_hash.description: Hash of the ABOM (model version + prompt bundle + tool schema + invariant bundle) the baseline is tied to. Invalidated when the ABOM changes.

gate_version.description: GATE framework version under which this baseline was captured.

corpus_descriptor.description: Source of the corpus. Either a documented production time window or a versioned eval set.

per_dimension_distributions.description: Keys are behavioural dimension names (e.g. tool_choice, output_length, refusal_rate, output_confidence). Values are distribution descriptors.

distribution_type.description: Drives which statistical test (chi-square vs Kolmogorov-Smirnov) C19 uses against this dimension.

support.description: Categories (for categorical) or empirical range (for continuous).

distribution_parameters.description: Test-specific summary statistics (counts per category, percentiles, empirical CDF samples).

signing_key_id.description: Identifier of the key that signed this baseline.

signature.description: Base64 signature over baseline_hash + canonicalised metadata.

approver_identity.description: Identity that approved the baseline (Baseline Owner in the C19 re-baselining runbook). Required for non-initial baselines.

previous_baseline_hash.description: Present on re-baselining. Links to the prior baseline that this artifact supersedes.
